## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and image generation for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog post publishing delayed due to image generation bottleneck; exploring templated image solution](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Slight decrease in blog performance (clicks/impressions), but expected to improve with consistent publishing](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [New AI-related content topics researched and ready for review, focusing on Metadata's new AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Design team resource constraints affecting content publication timeline](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

## Topics

### Image Generation Bottleneck

  - [Two-week delay in publishing due to waiting on custom images](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Proposal: Use templated images (like Bamboo HR) for faster turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
      - [6-7 Figma templates with swappable text](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Concerns about repetitiveness vs. current unique abstract images](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [AI-generated images (GPT+, Midjourney) tested but unsuitable due to text/logo issues](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [6 images ready, more expected today; 10 articles in "Ready for Review" stage](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### Blog Performance

  - [Slight decrease in clicks and impressions (both GrowthX content and entire blog)](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Top-performing topics: account-based marketing, B2B ads, book ads](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [150 images still missing alt text; CTAs needed for attribution](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Consistent publishing may increase crawl budget and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### New Content Research

  - [Additional keyword research done for new AI agents and landing page](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [17 new AI-related topics (rows 308-324 in Content OS)](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Low-volume but specific, bottom-of-funnel keywords with B2B angle](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Topics cover data analysis, creative optimization/generation, automated bidding](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Anthony to review and approve new topics today/tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Approved topics to be immediately sent for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Process change: "Topic Approved" status to be used for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anthony to download and add available images after the call](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Send next 20 topics for consideration to get ahead](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Discuss templated image idea with the design team](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve new AI-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Aida to share Bamboo HR blog example in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Anthony to push for more design resources to unblock content publication](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Complete image alt text and CTA additions for better attribution](https://fathom.video/share/E86XEL3iGiH_9GRnZLFfz4tFyN1Rxary?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
